# Assembl — Specialist Workflows for NZ Businesses
# assembl.co.nz

## What Assembl is
Assembl is a New Zealand-built platform designed to help businesses reduce admin, surface issues earlier, and keep people in control. Rather than replacing staff, Assembl supports the teams already doing the work — with specialist workflows that handle repetitive checks, reminders, approvals, and follow-through. Built on a governed architecture where every material action is policy-gated, explainable, and auditable. Simulation testing is used before broader deployment.

## Kete (Industry Packs)
- Manaaki: Hospitality & Tourism (9 agents — AURA, SAFFRON, CELLAR, LUXE, MOANA, COAST, KURA, PAU, SUMMIT)
- Hanga: Construction (9 agents — ATA, ĀRAI, KAUPAPA, RAWA, WHAKAAĒ, PAI, ARC, TERRA, PINNACLE)
- Auaha: Creative & Media (9 agents — PRISM, MUSE, PIXEL, VERSE, ECHO, FLUX, CHROMATIC, RHYTHM, MARKET)
- Pakihi: Business & Commerce (11 agents — LEDGER, VAULT, CATALYST, COMPASS, HAVEN, COUNTER, GATEWAY, HARVEST, GROVE, SAGE, ASCEND)
- Waka: Transport & Vehicles (3 agents — MOTOR, TRANSIT, MARINER)
- Hangarau: Technology (12 agents — SPARK, SENTINEL, NEXUS-T, CIPHER, RELAY, MATRIX, FORGE, ORACLE, EMBER, REEF, PATENT, FOUNDRY)
- Hauora: Health, Wellbeing, Sport & Lifestyle (8 agents — TURF, LEAGUE, VITALS, REMEDY, VITAE, RADIANCE, PALETTE, ODYSSEY)
- Te Kāhui Reo: Māori Business Intelligence (8 agents — WHĀNAU, ROHE, KAUPAPA-M, MANA, KAITIAKI, TĀURA, WHAKAARO, HIRINGA)
- Tōroa: Family Navigator (1 agent — TŌROA, $29/mo consumer product)

## Shared Core Foundation (8 agents)
CHARTER, ARBITER, SHIELD, ANCHOR, AROHA, PULSE, SCHOLAR, NOVA

## Pricing
Launch Sprint: NZ$2,500–$6,000+ (one-off setup)
Kete Tīmatanga (Starter): NZ$750–$1,500/mo
Kete Tupu (Growth): NZ$1,500–$4,000/mo
Kete Rangatira (Enterprise): NZ$4,000–$15,000+/mo
Tōroa: NZ$29/mo (consumer)
All prices NZ$ + GST.

## Location
Auckland, New Zealand
